query: Gate 1 cleared — the champion approved catalog.json for the harbor-logistics engagement this morning. Scaffold the plugin and run the full build across all 32 skills from the digests in discovery/digests/.
champion signed off on the catalog friday — build it. engagement root is /engagements/acme-claims and the plugin name in catalog.json is claims-copilot
before committing to the full 40-skill run, lets do a pilot — just the five intake skills — so the champion can see quality first. how do i run a subset of the catalog?
verify-scores.json shows fail verdicts for quote-generation and renewal-letters, and the workflow lost two slugs mid-run. re-run just those four and update their catalog statuses.
catalog is approved and frozen. time to turn the digests into the actual plugin — skeleton, templates, agents, then author every skill and verify each one as it lands
alright, plan's locked for the meridian-ops engagement. how long will 38 skills take to author and verify? kick the run off in the background and let's watch the run record
catalog.json for the fieldworks plugin lists six templates and two agents — set up plugin.json, the phase-router commands, and copy the template files in before the per-skill runs start
the run record shows the same blocking issue about unresolved template paths in the last 4 skills — stop the workflow, fix it once at the source, and resume the rest of the run

the build workflow just returned — merge the open questions, update catalog statuses, run the plugin validator plus the confidentiality sweep, and republish the dashboard so the champion can do gate 2
each skill we author for the underwriting plugin has to ship with trigger-evals.json, evals.json, checks.json, and a reference solution — make sure the run produces all four eval artifacts per skill
digests are finished for the claims team — what skills should we build? put together the catalog and stage it on the dashboard for the champion to approve
hold off on building anything — the champion wants the catalog reshaped first: merge the three reporting skills into one and cut the two low-priority entries from catalog.json
champion's dashboard notes are in — the built quote skill's tone is off and she wants two skills merged. apply her feedback and re-verify whatever changed
the plugin is built — run the trigger benchmark against the hold-out set and tell me whether we hit the accuracy target before anyone installs it
generate a synthetic practice project for the claims-copilot plugin and run it end to end so we can watch the skills fire before the team sees it
what makes a skill description trigger reliably? i'm hand-writing one for the intake workflow and want to follow the doctrine on descriptions and near-misses
here's the ops team's sharepoint export — playbooks, templates, a couple of interview transcripts. turn it all into digests so we can build them a plugin later
evals passed — package claims-copilot into an installable marketplace and build out the team-facing site with the install guide and tutorials wiki
a teammate reported that the deployed plugin picked the wrong skill when they asked for a renewal letter — turn the misfire into a pinned eval case and fix it
write a quick script that reads catalog.json and counts how many skills are marked built vs verified, then prints a table
